initiatives.title: Right to Abortion
initiatives.description: Establishes fundamental right to abortion before fetal viability in AZ Constitution
initiatives.notes: Most expensive ballot measure campaign in AZ history

initiatives.title: Make Elections Fair Act
initiatives.description: Replaces partisan primaries with a single open primary where all candidates appear on one ballot regardless of party, top finishers advance to general election
initiatives.backers: Make Elections Fair AZ / Chuck Coughlin
initiatives.notes: Legislature placed Prop 133 on the ballot specifically to block this measure

initiatives.title: Predatory Debt Collection Protection Act
initiatives.description: Raises the property value exempt from creditor seizure and increases protected wages; caps medical debt interest at 3%

initiatives.title: Voters' Right to Know Act
initiatives.description: Requires disclosure of original sources of money for political ads and campaign spending over $5,000
initiatives.notes: Targeted dark money spending in Arizona elections

statutory.description: 10% of votes cast for governor in most recent election

constitutional.description: 15% of votes cast for governor in most recent election
